suite.name: SiteManagement

kw.name: Run Keywords
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.name: Debug Only
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${ORG_ADMIN_EMAIL}' not found.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.status: Suite setup failed: Variable '${ORG_ADMIN_EMAIL}' not found.
